OpenOrCadParser OLB fixture
===========================

Source: `Werni2A/OpenOrCadParser`, `test/test_cases/0000.OLB`

Upstream commit: `be0a83ac119390044952cf9bed1e0fb86c448f44`

License: MIT, copyright Dominik Wernberger. The upstream license text is
committed next to this README as `LICENSE`.

This tiny OrCAD Capture library fixture has `Library`, `Cache`, and one
`Packages/0000` stream, but no schematic page streams. It is used to lock the
OLB inventory entrypoint without committing a large vendor library.
